productDisplayName: Nike Men Dart 9 MSL Black Sports Shoes
description: Created to give a great running experience, the nike Dart 9 MSL running shoe is a top performer. Plush cushioning and great flexibility combine in this sneaker that stands up to everyday wear and tear. The mesh uppers provide great ventilation making this the perfect shoe for running in a hot climate while all the support features you expect from nike ensure your foot is protected and supported when you run.UpperBreathable mesh upper with stylish overlays which give support and shoe structure See-through mesh panels on each side for ultimate ventilationHighly padded mesh collar and tongue offering exceptional comfort and breathabilityLace-up system for a snug FitMidsoleFoam midsole for ultra-lightweight, springy cushioning and soft, responsive shock absorptionDynamic Support system to adapt to your stridePadded footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleNon-marking rubber outsole for durabilityRaised lugs and deep grooves for maximum traction, with a scooped heel for extra cushioningFlex grooves at the outsole for a more natural range of motion and enhanced flexibilityShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
